title: Hestan OvenBond Provisions - Oval au Gratin Dishes Stainless Steel, Set of 2, (13 Ounce), Small (6.5" x 5.5")
features: Provisions Oval Au Gratin pan (6.5x5.5 inch). Meticulously crafted from the highest-grade 18/10 stainless steel, Provisions Au Gratins are beautiful, thoughtfully designed, and a pleasure to use

Clad Stainless Steel: With aluminum core delivers flawless heating performance up to 600 ºF (315ºC), for perfect baking of every one-dish recipe. Handles with rounded edges, precise ergonomics re flush with the interior surface for easy cleanup
Superior clad design with aluminum core is crafted to optimal dimensions and offers even heat distribution, while signature flush rivets and modern ergonomics help elevate every recipe

Meticulously designed together with Michelin-starred Chef Thomas Keller, this durable and sophisticated kitchen-to-table au gratin goes beyond the ordinary oval baker, with exquisite form, finish, and function

At HESTAN we believe the kitchen is the heart of every home. Each collection of cookware is built with thoughtful innovation and meticulous craftsmanship for a lifetime of beautiful unparalleled performance
description: Elegance, craftsmanship, and functionality converge in the kitchen with Provisions Oval Au Gratins from Hestan Culinary. Meticulously crafted from the highest-grade 18/10 stainless steel to the same exacting standards as Hestan cookware, the Provisions Au Gratins are the results of our chefs and engineers challenging every design detail from form to finish. From impeccable construction to jewelry-grade finishing, Hestan these bakers are entirely bespoke - designed to satisfy the demands of Michelin-starred chefs and everyday needs of discerning home cooks. From meal prep to oven to table service, Provisions Au Gratins are beautiful, thoughtfully designed, and a pleasure to use. Meticulously designed together with Michelin-starred Chef Thomas Keller, this durable and sophisticated kitchen-to-table au gratin goes beyond the ordinary oval baker, with exquisite form, finish, and function. Superior clad design with aluminum core is crafted to optimal dimensions and offers even heat distribution, while signature flush rivets and modern ergonomics help elevate every recipe. Its medium size - 12.5 inches by 9 inches - is ideal for a variety of one-dish presentations from potatoes au gratin and eggplant parmesan to prime rib and your favorite cobbler. HIGHEST-GRADE STAINLESS STEEL: Crafted from the highest-grade 18/10 stainless steel, this oval au gratin baking pan won’t dent, rust, or bend - even after years in the kitchen. CLAD STAINLESS STEEL: A thick aluminum core clad with stainless steel delivers flawless heating performance up to 600 ºF (315ºC), for perfect baking of every one-dish recipe. SIGNATURE HANDLES & FLUSH RIVETS: Handles are made from cast stainless steel for rounded edges, precise ergonomics, and form-fitted attachment to the pan with dual rivets, which are flush with the interior surface for easy cleanup FIT & FINISH: With brushed exteriors and interiors, beautifully polished bezel rims, and Hestan monogram laser-etched into handles, the fit and finish of these elegant au gratins are commensurate with those of fine jewelry. USE & CARE: Durable 18/10 stainless steel is dishwasher safe. To prevent scratches, avoid use of harsh cleaning products and metal scouring pads. LIFETIME WARRANTY: Hestan stands by all of its products with a lifetime warranty on all manufacturing defects. If your investment doesn’t meet our standard of quality, we’ll replace it. Provisions™ Au Gratins are produced in our Hestan-owned factories in Thailand
